do_not_retain: S3 noncurrent versions for deleted artifacts
EBS result/log/checkpoint duplicates after git closure is committed
principle: Git stores knowledge and reproducibility metadata; S3/EBS store only artifacts needed for immediate next tasks.

retain_on_ebs.path: Hugging Face cache for Qwen/Qwen3-1.7B if present
retain_on_ebs.reason: Speeds up TensorRT-LLM benchmark setup; reproducible from Hugging Face if absent.

retain_on_s3.reason: Small best LoRA adapter from the full-data run; optional TensorRT-LLM deployment comparison.
